quicksight.dashboard.seriesitem.CfnAbout:
The series item configuration of a line chart.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.seriesitem.DataFiel.Description: The data field series item configuration of a line chart.

quicksight.dashboard.seriesitem.FieldSer.Description: The field series item configuration of a line chart.
